result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 13:   JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each reassignment contributes 1 transfer to the prior owner
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  -- agents who appear as either initial/previous owner or new owner during the window
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM new_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.handled_cases ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each reassignment contributes 1 transfer to the prior owner
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  -- agents who appear as either initial/previous owner or new owner during the window
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM new_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.handled_cases ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each reassignment contributes 1 transfer to the prior owner
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  -- agents who appear as either initial/previous owner or new owner during the window
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM new_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.handled_cases ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM new_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.handled_cases ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS owner_changes_in_window
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%';

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS owner_changes_in_window
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%';

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
)
SELECT ch.field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
GROUP BY ch.field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
)
SELECT ch.id, ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate, ch.oldvalue__c, ch.newvalue__c
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    NULLIF(btrim(ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(btrim(ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner NOT IN ('None','null','NULL')
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM old_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner NOT IN ('None','null','NULL')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(leading '#' FROM new_owner), '\\s+$', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner NOT IN ('None','null','NULL')
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.handled_cases ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
